experience.summary: Worked in the Fluid Dynamic Lab on thermo-fluid analysis of a high-temperature gas turbine test rig, focusing on heat-loss and pressure-loss mechanisms in the heater-to-sensor flow path.
Worked with the energy team on ISO 50001 and EU EED-aligned energy performance analysis for industrial operations, focusing on structured measurement, follow-up and improvement prioritisation.

experience.role: Evening Shift Rider | Last Mile Delivery
experience.summary: Worked evening delivery shifts across Stockholm hubs, operating cargo bikes for last-mile logistics while studying.
Contributed to research on plastic pyrolysis, focusing on economics and technical feasibility of oil extraction from polymer waste.

experience.role: Wardrobe Manager | ETF Head | Guest and Safety
experience.summary: Managed wardrobe operations, led the Entre team as ETF Head and contributed to guest and safety processes for a large student event.
Contributed to API development, testing and cross-functional delivery across backend services.
Managed meeting minutes, coordinated student convention logistics and supported club administration.
Led Team TRAMS in the SAE India Bicycle Design Competition 2020 through design, analysis, documentation and competition submission.

experience.role: Student Intern | Automotive Intern | Case Study
experience.summary: Completed an industrial internship covering automotive manufacturing processes and operational workflows.
Industrial exposure to automation, hydraulics and pneumatics.
